title: Source health
description: Rolling fetch-reliability metrics for a source — one row per source, kept up to date by the track-source-health hook whenever new raw items arrive.

sourceId.description: the source these metrics are tracked for; one health row per source

fetchCount.description: total number of times the newsroom has polled this source

itemCount.description: total number of raw items this source has produced

errorCount.description: total number of failed fetch attempts for this source

lastError.description: the most recent error message from a failed fetch, if any

lastStatus.description: 'ok' or 'error' — the outcome of the most recent fetch attempt

successRate.description: rolling fraction of fetches that succeeded (0-1), used for the health strip

updatedAt.description: when these metrics were last updated

source.description: the source these health metrics describe
